name: Addisu Demissie
subject: 23 year old in Polk County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, The Iowa caucuses are only three months away, so I wanted to break down a bit of what I know about what's happening there right now. I got my start in the central and western parts of Polk County in 2003 as an organizer for John Kerry, and I saw up close what makes the caucuses special -- it's where I fell in love with this work and developed an incredible respect for a process like no other in our politics. First, everyone needs to know that Iowans take their pivotal role in our nominating process seriously. They don't make up their minds easily or quickly. So many of the folks I met took pride in candidate shopping, going out to hear them speak, and actually wanting to talk about it, even with a 23 year old kid from out of town who came knocking on their door. It does not surprise me in the least to know that a recent _New York Times_ poll reported that **two-thirds of likely caucus-goers said they could still be persuaded to change their minds.** It's why we've invested so heavily in having folks on the ground, making real connections with Iowans and ensuring Cory wins the caucus. If you can, please [**chip in to help us do that.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191102_AD_20191102-fr-AD-Iowa-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Last night was the famous Liberty and Justice Celebration, an annual event where Iowa Democrats gather to hear from the candidates. Let me tell you: It is a celebration. The signs, the chants, the marches, the intensity -- it's what democracy looks like if you could boil it down to pure energy and emotion. And it's been known to be a turning point in the race. That's because it's right around now that everything changes and starts to speed up. After a long summer, the leaves suddenly change color, drop to the ground, and _it gets cold._ For the organizers doing this work right now on the ground, every day of the next three months will feel like forever, but it'll be over in a blink. These organizers will build some incredible relationships in the weeks ahead. I was on a first-name basis with a lot of people in my turf and talked to many of them multiple times a week (and I still keep in touch with many of them). It's a grueling, painstaking process that all culminates in the chaos and glory of Caucus Night when people make up their minds -- maybe even a few times. **I left Iowa knowing that, with the right candidate and the right team of organizers, nothing is impossible -- and everything can change on a dime.** Well, you know how I feel about Cory Booker. And you should know that I believe our Iowa team is the best there is. That's why I wanted to write you today. When we send emails like this asking for a small donation to fund this work, it's for those organizers in Iowa (and across the country -- I see you New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina) working their tails off to make an underdog candidate the next president of the United States. **I believe, and I want to help you see why.[Will you chip in to help fund our team -- and give us a real shot to pull off something incredible?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191102_AD_20191102-fr-AD-Iowa-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you for reading and, as always, for being on this team. Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191102_AD_20191102-fr-AD-Iowa-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac3/5fca0d19/762b914f/291c0154/4110927127/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac3/5fca0d19/762b914f/291c0153/4110927127/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac3/5fca0d19/762b914f/291c0152/4110927127/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac3/5fca0d19/762b914f/291c0151/4110927127/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac3/5fca0d19/762b914f/291c0150/4110927127/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac3/5fca0d19/762b914f/291c0154/4110927127/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

The countdown is officially on. Election Day is on November 3rd, 2020, and we're gearing up for the most competitive race in the country. | [

---
Peter,

As of today, we're officially T-1 year out from Election Day 2020, and I just wanted to take a moment to thank you for sticking with me.

**[This race is already on track to be the most expensive, competitive race in the country. Will you help our campaign fuel up for the fight ahead?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53358976:sU7ksgwFN:m:1:2132176598:4F727B2F86F2FC151BD04618E45BA5FE:r)**

Over the next year, we'll be fighting on two fronts to get things done in Washington and to keep Arizona red.

My liberal opponent already has as much (if not more) cash on hand as Democratic presidential candidates, and with Democrats desperate to flip this seat, we're in for a battle.

**[Democrats have been plotting my defeat since the day I set foot in the Senate, but thanks to your support, we've reminded them who they're up against.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53358976:sU7ksgwFN:m:1:2132176598:4F727B2F86F2FC151BD04618E45BA5FE:r)**

My liberal opponent already has as much (if not more) cash on hand as Democratic presidential candidates, and with Democrats desperate to flip this seat, we're in for a battle. In service, Martha McSally | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system September 14, 2018. Over the course of this campaign, I’m going to give people here at home a clear choice: **Scott Perry represents the worst of the gridlock, the dysfunction, and the far-right politics that are poisoning Washington.**

It’s wrong that people can’t afford health care, seniors can’t afford medication, and our roads and bridges are crumbling -- but my opponent doesn’t have time for any of that. I won’t sit silently in Congress while it all happens. **I’ll fight for you, for our friends, for our families, and for our neighbors.**

**Just like I did in the state legislature,** when I challenged the status quo to call for increased transparency and became Pennsylvania’s first public official to publicly post expenses online, returned unused office expenses to taxpayers, and demanded the legislature ban taxpayer-funded “WAM” slush funds.

**And just like I’ve done as your Auditor General.** I’ve taken on entrenched bureaucrats and special interests, helped protect children from abuse, demanded thousands of untested rape kits be processed, exposed abuse in nursing homes, and saved taxpayers millions by shining a light on government waste, fraud, and abuse.

**But the insiders and the special interests fought me every step of the way.** They didn’t appreciate an outsider coming in to root out corruption and reform their entrenched old ways. Thanks to the support of people like you, though, we’ve made a difference for our communities.

[**So now I need your support again. I’m taking the fight to Congress, where the hyper-partisans, Washington corporate lobbyists, and political insiders are going to do everything they can to stop me. Will you pitch in to help me take them on?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11495342/117105114/-389114567?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE0OTFlMC01OWZlLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=um-GeKeW59oAkTiZIiWov1GxEXetKRl7Y73PiY2hYko=&refcode=welc2&amount=25)

Thanks for your support,
Eugene DePasquale **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11495343/117105115/-389114567?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjE0OTFlMC01OWZlLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=um-GeKeW59oAkTiZIiWov1GxEXetKRl7Y73PiY2hYko=&refcode=welc2&amount=25)**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One year out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
365 days until ELECTION DAY. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca3e79f556f422b2f045479e39d15c21963b0ff1d6fc7fd624184bb224992933bd07af6ae8e2667e0449a7127346bdf89efccee1d828d7dc)

Friend,

One. Year.

In just 365 days, the American People will decide if we are going to **Keep America Great,** or if we're going to let our great country fall into the hands of a _Never Trumper SOCIALIST._

The Left has been watching my every move for the past three years and hoping that my administration and I will fail. But, because of your support, we just keep WINNING. Just take a look at everything we've accomplished so far:
* **Created the BEST economy ever**
* **Brought two radical ISIS leaders to justice**
* **Appointed two conservative Supreme Court Justices**
* **Implemented the nation 's most historic tax cuts**
* **Rebuilt our nation 's military**
* **Brought the unemployment numbers to a record low**
* **Strengthened our borders like never before - the WALL is being BUILT**
* **Initiated the denuclearization of North Korea**
* **And so much more**

After looking at all of our HUGE WINS, do the Democrats honestly think they can beat me in 2020? They're insane!

But that's not going to stop them from ATTACKING me every minute of the day to try and trick the American People. And that's why I need YOU.
---
|
I've selected a small group of my most loyal supporters, like you, to become my **Official Election Year Advisors.** As an Advisor, I'll be relying on YOUR input as we head into this critical election year.
**Your answers will represent every patriot from YOUR STATE.**

name: Jeff Larivee
subject: Zoe asked me to make sure you got her message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Hi there, wanted to make sure you saw Zoe’s note. The election is ONE YEAR from TODAY, and California is going to be make or break when it comes to holding the House. We won seven seats in 2018 largely in part of the work Zoe did - she needs your continued support to keep that success rolling into 2020. We need to bring in $1,215 more by midnight - chip in now.

name: Bruce Sinclair, Campaign Manager
subject: Derek, this election depends on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Donald Trump's supporters vote at higher rates than Democrats, and we need your help to turn that around.
|
---
| | I have some troubling news, Derek:

After looking at past voting data, we've found that **Donald Trump's supporters typically turn out at a higher rate than Democrats in off-year elections like this one -- especially here in Virginia.** It's just one more reason we need to double down on our efforts to flip the General Assembly this Tuesday, re-elect Mark Warner, and defeat Donald Trump next November.

**And it's why I have to ask you right now:[ Will you make a donation to Mark's campaign today to help us keep Virginia blue and flip the Senate in 2020?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7e8/53d9897e/5233a075/1c891560/1708459859/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gopvoting?refcode=20191103nd__318__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

**If we're going to flip the General Assembly and hold Mark's Senate seat,** we can't take anything for granted -- especially since Mark only won re-election by less than 1% in 2014. Not to mention the fact that Donald Trump's campaign is headquartered here in the Commonwealth, and his Trump Victory Initiative is working to boost GOP voter turnout across Virginia. The elections this week and in 2020 will depend on turnout -- and that means they depend on you.

**So please Derek, remember to get out there and vote in Tuesday's General Assembly election. And please make a donation to help us turn out Democrats to defeat Donald Trump and keep Virginia's Senate seat blue.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation body:
What are you doing on November 8th? | |

#
Peter, In the midst of this Impeachment Hoax, there’s nobody I’d rather spend time with than my most loyal supporters. I don’t want to spend another second with the SWAMP, I want to be amongst the PEOPLE. That’s why I have an exciting announcement for ONLY my TOP supporters, and I can’t wait to share it with you. I’ve scheduled an important event in Atlanta on November 8th where I’ll be meeting with great American Patriots, and [**I want YOU to be there with me as my VIP guest. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3d88c2e861&e=02cd889ad3) My good friend, who’s a true warrior, Senator David Perdue, will also be there to meet and talk with the great people of Georgia. All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT by November 4th, and you’ll automatically be entered to win a meal with me. This offer is exclusive to my most LOYAL defenders, like YOU, so DON’T share this with anyone else. [**Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to be automatically entered to win a trip to meet me in Atlanta on November 8th.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a46b5e7165&e=02cd889ad3)

We’ll even take a photo together so we can remember this day forever. [**Contribute ANY AMOUNT by the deadline on November 4th to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to meet your favorite President! **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=33d6b7431c&e=02cd889ad3) Thank you,

Peter,

We're officially one year out from Election Day, and **[we still need your help to reach our $25,000 goal!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890868/7f51f7bc/4b32a1b3/4ef348b2/2912403758/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutdayofmatch?refcode=email_20191103.1nd__470__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Your donation to our One Year Out Fund will:
* Send MJ all over the state to meet voters (she's already traveled 8,000 miles!)
* Help her **spread her message** of putting our families first -- NOT special interests!
* Hire staff for key campaign positions
* **Help us build the organization we need to DEFEAT Senator Cornyn!**

Senator Cornyn has spent nearly 20 years in Washington selling us out to special interests like Big Pharma and the gun lobby. It's time to elect a senator who works for Texans -- but we only have one year left to build the campaign we need to do it!

**This grassroots team has helped us start strong these last few months -- now we have to take advantage of every month we have left. Rush a MATCHED donation to the One Year Out Fund before tonight's midnight deadline to help us reach our $25,000 goal and defeat Senator Cornyn!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Rush a MATCHED donation to the One Year Out Fund before tonight's midnight deadline to help us reach our $25,000 goal and defeat Senator Cornyn! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Team MJ *If you've already contributed to the campaign or donated through a different source, thank you so much! name: Addisu Demissie
subject: re: New month, new priorities -- but same old me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Did you see Cory's message, team? Before we solidify our campaign strategy for this month, we want to hear from you. **[Will you take our November Priorities Survey?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-priorities-survey?source=em_su_20191103_AD_20191103-su-AD-priorities2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** So often, people come up to our team members on the campaign trail with great ideas for how we can best put ourselves in a position to win the Democratic nomination and beat Donald Trump next November. **We hear you.** That's why we created this brand new survey, so folks from across the country can let us know what's on their minds. Here's a link: **[https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-priorities-survey](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-priorities-survey?source=em_su_20191103_AD_20191103-su-AD-priorities2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks team,
Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ There's a lot on the horizon for our campaign, team:
1. The next DNC debate is **less than three weeks away** , and I'm already starting to prepare.
2. The Iowa caucuses are **only three months away** (with New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina soon after), and our teams on the ground are busy talking to voters and caucus-goers who are starting to make final decisions on whom to support.
3. We also **need to grow our campaign to 200,000 individual donors** to qualify for the December debate.

But first, I want to hear from you. **[Will you take our brand new Official Cory 2020 November Priorities Survey?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-priorities-survey?source=em_su_20191103_AD_20191103-su-AD-priorities2-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is the best way to have your input shared directly with me and this campaign. Your input will help us plan our strategy for the coming weeks. Thanks for sharing your thoughts,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-priorities-survey?source=em_su_20191103_AD_20191103-su-AD-priorities2-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0acd/5fca0d19/762f8bad/291c0026/851770822/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0acd/5fca0d19/762f8bad/291c0025/851770822/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0acd/5fca0d19/762f8bad/291c0024/851770822/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0acd/5fca0d19/762f8bad/291c0023/851770822/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0acd/5fca0d19/762f8bad/291c0022/851770822/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0acd/5fca0d19/762f8bad/291c0026/851770822/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's DACA policies are on the docket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program is about to have its day before the Supreme Court, as lower courts have blocked Trump and his racist administration from ending this program and triggering mass deportations. Now, Trump's two appointed justices, Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, could hold the swing votes that determine the future of DACA recipients and immigrants as a whole. Nearly a million people have relied on this program, allowing them to seek employment, to work, and to contribute tax dollars as active members of our communities. They are our neighbors, friends, and family members. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. We're asking voters what their thoughts are so we can understand where you stand on this critical issue: **Do you support DACA?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc7b/6e9863e8/16162244/1db0819c/174789849/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/hWZI5tfk") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc7b/6e9863e8/16162244/1db0819c/174789849/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/hWZI5tfk") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc7b/6e9863e8/16162244/1db081e2/174789849/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191103a.ND-b&refcode2=ArByoOJ2ufxgIvBwzrIi")

name: Tim Walz
subject: About today
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, We're exactly one year from Election Day 2020. From what we've seen over the past 12 months, it's clear that flipping Minnesota red is at the top of President Trump's list next year. And we know exactly what his strategy will be to try to do it: He will spend millions to broadcast his message of fear and division on a scale we've never seen before. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/vOdTIwd4mGTHmYQk61_EuB9fSp3dqN0Sc84K8x_dAMo=/7Km9BCgk2fN9dvpmjvEPIkSkQxlu3_bOCXsVwDC7Th0=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
We're exactly one year from Election Day 2020.
From what we've seen over the past 12 months, it's clear that flipping Minnesota red is at the top of President Trump's list next year. And we know exactly what his strategy will be to try to do it: He will spend millions to broadcast his message of fear and division on a scale we've never seen before.
**Unfortunately, Minnesota Republicans up and down the ballot are already rallying around President Trump and his divisive message. It 's deeply disappointing. But more importantly it's dangerous.** I will not sit by and let smear campaigns and hateful attacks on our fellow Minnesotans go unanswered next year. We must be prepared to counter their negativity with a message of optimism and unity.
I'm fired up to get started. That's why I've asked our campaign team to hit the ground running in the one year stretch and expand their efforts tomorrow to support our One Minnesota allies across the state.
**They need an additional $5,000 by midnight to pull it off. It 's ambitious, but I know we can get it done if we work together. [Can I count on you to make a contribution of $5 or more to help us get there in time?](https://act.myngp.com/el/vOdTIwd4mGTHmYQk61_EuB9fSp3dqN0Sc84K8x_dAMo=/7Km9BCgk2fN9dvpmjvEPIkSkQxlu3_bOCXsVwDC7Th0=?refcode=body&amount=25)**

****[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/vOdTIwd4mGTHmYQk61_EuB9fSp3dqN0Sc84K8x_dAMo=/7Km9BCgk2fN9dvpmjvEPIkSkQxlu3_bOCXsVwDC7Th0=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-p)****
****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/vOdTIwd4mGTHmYQk61_EuB9fSp3dqN0Sc84K8x_dAMo=/7Km9BCgk2fN9dvpmjvEPIkSkQxlu3_bOCXsVwDC7Th0=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-p)****
****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/vOdTIwd4mGTHmYQk61_EuB9fSp3dqN0Sc84K8x_dAMo=/7Km9BCgk2fN9dvpmjvEPIkSkQxlu3_bOCXsVwDC7Th0=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-p)****
****[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/vOdTIwd4mGTHmYQk61_EuB9fSp3dqN0Sc84K8x_dAMo=/7Km9BCgk2fN9dvpmjvEPIkSkQxlu3_bOCXsVwDC7Th0=?refcode=_other-p)****
Thank you for helping us reject the politics of fear and division and joining us in the pursuit of a brighter future for our state.
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz

body:
---
| | Peter -- we CAN win the Senate in 2020 by taking down three of the most right-wing and anti-democracy Republicans. We're starting with Mitch McConnell, the Senate's obstructionist-in-Chief. He calls himself the Grim Reaper because he'll kill ANY bill that helps the American people -- but Mitch is the least popular Senator in the country, so we CAN defeat him in 2020. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter -- we CAN win the Senate in 2020 by taking down three of the most right-wing and anti-democracy Republicans. We're starting with Mitch McConnell, the Senate's obstructionist-in-Chief. He calls himself the Grim Reaper because he'll kill ANY bill that helps the American people -- _**but Mitch is the least popular Senator in the country,**_ so we CAN defeat him in 2020. **[Can you pitch in so we'll stand a chance against McConnell's NINE MILLION DOLLAR campaign fund? >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0673/72412298/419f686a/6103c217/3125354441/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_nov?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+pitch+in+so+wersquoll+stand+a+ch&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1")** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0673/72412298/419f686a/6103c216/3125354441/VEsE/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_nov?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1") | | | [Ditch Mitch >> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0673/72412298/419f686a/6103c219/3125354441/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9ub3YiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MTEwM18zU2VuYXRlU2VhdHNfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_nov?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Ditch+Mitch+gtgt+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1")

Susan Collins failed women across the country when she voted for accused abuser Brett Kavanaugh's Supreme Court nomination. **She 's rapidly losing support in Maine, and her seat is currently rated a Toss-Up.**
**[But like Mitch, she's received millions of dollars from GOP dark money groups that are determined to keep her in office. Can you contribute $5, $10, or $20 so we can defeat Susan in 2020? >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0673/72412298/419f686a/6103c218/3125354441/VEsC/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_nov?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+But+like+Mitch+shersquos+received+millio&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1")**

| | [Sayonara, Susan! >> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0673/72412298/419f686a/6103c21a/3125354441/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9ub3YiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MTEwM18zU2VuYXRlU2VhdHNfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_nov?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Sayonara+Susan+gtgt+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_191103_3SenateSeats_U1_X1")

Lindsey Graham is a staunch defender of Donald Trump, no matter what.
_**He 's even trying to block Congress's power to impeach the president so that Trump can stay in office after he asked a foreign government to rig the 2020 election.**_
Graham's been stepping up his violent, racist, and anti-democratic agenda lately, so we need to fight harder than ever to take him down in one of the reddest states in the country.

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Why I am endorsing Jamaal Bowman
body:
| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_gA/ni0YAA/t.2we/EKjIPUP0RcWPmaG2B0Jxbw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLrnLz2lFxw1j6nghDtELKIYUoeh6VKEhZxSQB1QGASLxkzGvK1-2BUuA7ZQPuwH0zqjRTm-2FhGDQA-2BmnuwjVsZ5prRop2VubQxanHX0M8DeoDtVTHJugvlAm-2FGym5NspH6iNonQJ2F8-2F3h34EUQHk96pO-2F4g8hLIQ8d3yfHa3pPmuV-2BrFLf-2F8IHHDkep0aRA3T3qcsmy05yBE3d-2F9HsDUHzedOrE6LtcT-2FCdHMV7kdBh19-2FSJyFU-2FHDn7TdjStVvWnJt0LBFK9PHWY5IHeK7H3pYbLrc3ZAuJlFj67yqehdMmK7MGES93UkuRqyasiC4xd-2BRZPZvaUTpQFEfAzKGpBmv5/FoQf)
---
Peter, **This is a pivotal moment for our country.** Our public school system has been robbed. Corruption is rampant as our institutions and programs get looted to serve wealthy interests. We're nearly out of time to curb climate change. The costs of essentials like healthcare for everyday people are skyrocketing. **We need a fierce and effective advocate in Congress who will fight for real change; we need Jamaal Bowman.** **For my first endorsement this election cycle, I am proud to endorse******Jamaal Bowman for Congress.**** He has fought for teachers, students, and families in the Bronx and Westchester for twenty years. He works as the founding principal of one of the best public middle schools in the city, the Cornerstone Academy for Social Action. As a leader in the opt out movement across the state, Jamaal connected parents from diverse backgrounds to the fight. He has been a steering committee member for NYSAPE, where his work centered on successfully dismantling Common Core in New York and decoupling teacher evaluations from student test scores. He has also been a member of New York State Early Childhood Blue Ribbon Committee, where he championed early childhood learning standards. **We need his experience, passion, and expertise in Congress.**
---
[ **SEND AN EDUCATOR TO CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_gA/ni0YAA/t.2we/EKjIPUP0RcWPmaG2B0Jxbw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLrnLz2lFxw1j6nghDtELKIYUoeh6VKEhZxSQB1QGASL8SOe9GdqX74pyDUPe7Up1gzWz8IdHRuD-2B1Hqm9LXahwyWOZzm6SAjrGIRk-2BK5HRGBZHyvYHP9Trcf2LKv3jrOLi4ArxfIkel5CeUcaeGnOe9dfW3QIlWWXmJFpPFtTgo0O0GXMHFjVSHOacqGJ1z9POeWWRsn6rnFy640KOiX0pfWVgsooGT9oQ-2Fg6pCI-2BPg-2FV5tnwGAmDiGlitjYaM-2Bf-2BpPpXH0sY6eK1stfSuxEylabovVSUFlhNNkrnfk25nkMZnfbmEg7da9jOprQbVJyBH7JT0dmhuvRWAs1C-2FCuUK/Fyt_)
---
**Jamaal and I agree: we need to take a restorative justice approach to education and the economy.** We need to right the wrongs of the past by heavily investing in our future. We need a system that ensures that every student receives the holistic education they deserve. **We need Jamaal Bowman.** **We could be a progressive beacon for the rest of the world.** Jamaal has been leading the way, working to better students and his community for decades. He has stood shoulder-to-shoulder with the progressive movement. **That 's why I felt it was so important that I reach out to you.**
---
**Jamaal has powerful interests lining up against him, so this race won 't be easy.** But with your help, we can build a grassroots movement that they won't be able to stop! [So can you donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_gA/ni0YAA/t.2we/EKjIPUP0RcWPmaG2B0Jxbw/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLrnLz2lFxw1j6nghDtELKIYUoeh6VKEhZxSQB1QGASL5Fq2c9zsoEYKfyaL6cBHj6I0GCzYaMsSKcFRNVKifkieVqREl6TpeDPrcVALyeb3HQxW5HCA7clYZ-2B5LRGlygqpNRcmfr-2FT2D3sMIlE6AKVf39a7CCY2sqEJfCPZp7cBi2mUm1ullhG7imhdKkOXJQ4-2FNS3FWLZdK5vxJ197lhukWfrRQTYMcWdqhEpd-2B0hoZg3aONgXGM9ZIxqtoOyTIsKVX73Qrqi1UTUHc4uDeQv9sOZwAgpR89UdV-2FLdovKqGEqRRYAyxK-2BoIB06lLTbTQ-3D/ccVq), name: Sara Gideon
subject: One year from today, we will face Susan Collins at the ballot box.
body:
I can't do this alone.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cdf/4bef7a87/6b03ddf9/287fc3b4/747644881/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
**Today marks exactly one year until Election Day.**
That might sound like a long time, but I promise you, it isn't - not with how much work we have left to do.
That's why my pledge to you is that we are going to run hard, every single one of the 365 days we have left. We are going to talk about the issues that matter most to the people of Maine and we are going to empower our supporters to do the kind of big and important work it will take to win.
Because the truth is, I cannot do this alone. We are taking on virtually the entire Republican Party establishment and powerful special interests who will spend what it takes to protect Susan Collins and preserve the status quo.
**It 's critical that we make the most of every single one of the 365 days we have left. Will you help us do it?**
[**Make a contribution to our people-powered campaign today. We 're off to a very strong start, but we have to keep pushing every single day if we want to win. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cdf/4bef7a87/6b03ddf9/287fc38b/747644881/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191103-full")
Let me be clear, this is an important race. The result will make a very real difference in the lives of people in Maine and across the country.
I'm not saying the next year will be an easy journey - but it _will_ be an important one. And with you by my side, I know we can get there.
All my best,
_Sara_
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cdf/4bef7a87/6b03ddf9/287fc38b/747644881/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191103-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cdf/4bef7a87/6b03ddf9/287fc38a/747644881/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cdf/4bef7a87/6b03ddf9/287fc389/747644881/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I need to be completely honest here. I need 200,000 donors to qualify for the debates. But I'm fighting for a spot against billionaires like Tom Steyer -- _**who pledged to spend $100 million of his own money to buy his way onto that stage.**_ [_**I wasn 't born into privilege. I've worked hard for everything I've ever earned. And I haven't taken a cent from billionaires or corporate PACs to get on that stage. name: Jason Yates
subject: Tomorrow: Nationwide night of prayer
body:
| | Lift up our nation together in prayer
---
| Peter, Join us tomorrow night for A Night of Prayer on [Facebook](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-yNNByaJlqefM8sWd_ZbcR206Xs9EXsqZFqgL7ruRCSXw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=1) or [YouTube](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZlkQoXsli9e9OAEwmK_Q8g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=2). It’s the night before the November 5 elections, and we encourage you to be a part of lifting up our nation together in prayer. More than 49,000 elections are scheduled before the end of 2019. In November alone, 35 states will be conducting elections, the bulk of which are scheduled for Tuesday, November 5. **Pray with us on November 4 at 8:00 pm ET / 5:00 pm PT by clicking on this link to watch on[Facebook](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-yNNByaJlqefM8sWd_ZbcR206Xs9EXsqZFqgL7ruRCSXw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=3) or [YouTube](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZlkQoXsli9e9OAEwmK_Q8g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=4).** We will spend time praying for:
1. Christians to awaken to the need to take action and influence their communities with their faith.
2. Christians to use their vote to uphold biblical values and select candidates who affirm our Constitution.
3. Our nation to return to God’s principles which bring peace and prosperity.

I hope you will make time to join with other believers across the nation and unite in prayer. There is nothing more powerful or important that we can do for our country. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-yNNByaJlqefM8sWd_ZbcR206Xs9EXsqZFqgL7ruRCSXw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=5) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZlkQoXsli9e9OAEwmK_Q8g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=6) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=7) **P.S. If you are not able to join us for the live event tonight, consider reading and praying through our 2019 election day prayer by clicking here:**[https://www.MyFaithVotes.org/2019-election-day-prayer](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFj7eaJPIfCRhflCGanVsGh6Bn40jLR7xowrIhJIdEJIfg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=8).
---
* * *

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=11) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191103com01&n=12)

name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: In just one year...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Tina's election is a year away, and that means everything we do between now and November 3, 2020 really counts. Can you help out?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191103oneyear-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

One year from today is Election Day 2020.

That means one year from today, we can make Trump a one-term president, take back the majority in the Senate, and keep this Senate seat blue.

But to do that, we need to work hard every single day here in Minnesota. We're not taking anything for granted.

Minnesota will be a key state in this next election. _The Washington Post_ reports that flipping Minnesota is key to the Republicans' plan to hold their Senate majority. And Trump's campaign is planning to spend up to $30 million here and has already endorsed Tina's opponent.

Tina is on the frontlines in this election. And between now and Election Day, **we need to do everything we can to defend Tina so we can win the White House, keep Minnesota blue, and take back the Senate.**

body:
Today, we're officially a year away from Election Day -- November 3, 2020. A million things will happen during these next 366 days (next year is a leap year!) to try to distract our movement from the | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528d5a/45c30650/106c4379f/66f5612f/2528260410/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Today, we're officially a year away from Election Day -- November 3, 2020.

A million things will happen during these next 366 days (next year is a leap year!) to try to distract our movement from the big, structural change we're fighting for. A million news cycles, and a million tweets.

The wealthy and powerful like it when our politics feels chaotic and messy. Because if we don't feel hopeful -- if we don't believe that change is possible -- they get to keep everything exactly the way it is.

But we know how to win.

**We win when we get out there, and we get organized.** If we give people a reason to go to the polls and cast their ballots -- if we fight for big ideas that inspire people to get in the fight -- we will win.

**But it starts with the movement we build right now. We've got less than a year to reach as many Americans as possible, and it takes real resources.**

**[Will you make your first donation today on November 3, 2019? On Election Night next year, you'll know that you invested in the grassroots movement that made it all possible.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528d5a/45c30650/106c4379f/66f56111/2528260410/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1MMDFGX0VHUl9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MTEwM19WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-nov19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML01F_EGR_GRM_E_20191103_V1S1_P")**

>
On November 3, 2020, we will decide if corruption will get another four years in the White House, or if we finally put an end to business-as-usual in Washington.

Together, we can prove that it's possible to run -- and win -- without relying on the wealth and connections of the rich and powerful. It's possible to elect a president with zero closed-door fundraisers, zero PAC money, and zero lobbyist influence.

**But you don't get what you don't fight for.** We have to fight for the biggest anti-corruption plan since Watergate. We have to fight to get big money out of our politics -- by building an even more powerful movement fueled by grassroots donors.

**When we fight side by side -- when we persist together -- we will show the wealthy and well-connected that change is coming sooner than they think.

In just a year, actually.**

**[Can you chip in whatever you can today to help power our grassroots movement towards November 3, 2020-- and the big, structural change we'll make in 2021 and beyond?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528d5a/45c30650/106c4379f/66f56111/2528260410/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1MMDFGX0VHUl9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MTEwM19WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-nov19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML01F_EGR_GRM_E_20191103_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Lerah Lee for Congress
subject: 365 days from now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:
Our failure to come together as a nation based on our common values has led us to a boiling point that will come to head in just 365 daysI’m the radical left’s worst nightmare: a descendent of slaves and Native Americans who isn’t drinking the Kool-Aid Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_s=5080934277a44f39964019831478c79e&_t=Yc1HKK0CzsbpLk4-vTml3_hdzyPXLnU-MagEkhLwdLvdsO7xIEGyyghby5adEJyWHj1s_xwMOHONPaMoNAU26h-eiJY-S3HCl8qYFMHpTbOBnYS5TXWjWWe0BmrYNBmdUZajOKTwv8HPjQg3W6YiCFRaxPv71woGAnTfTtgxb6Y%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=5080934277a44f39964019831478c79e&_e=Y6GN1dDPCAmpe393eW5D1YY-l1_BpcPr2RwupWLdPa1APJEbO-kSAYMWhhHpGSRM80Zc7pUGumYnl5FtCKMxS172DMA2OFFL2bE3XAPIvhr6nhTHV-97JdvEfvd1S2hj78Y4UNiQ1XJLtYOBIdgGYhG35tZlzItn3tK2an6NV-sliMY2O-hu5B8Wv0VjaOthajkHOjR5aL9et04-Z1akmskW7GhvwDR0HYPjUH4j2r7yNobPjvKSNKs4Kkctp5bp7DQj4lKWYJqAzYveDJ_lzy5a9bLjVlX5S4M1tcacp4CD57XfziIJxBTdFKWjbtv-)
---
Friend,

**One year from today** we will be headed to the polls to exercise our constitutional right to choose who leads our country: will we re-elect President Trump – or will we opt for a socialist like Elizabeth Warren? I keep asking myself the question: What will this country look like on November 3rd, 2020?

We’re living in polarizing times, %%First%% – there is no denying that. Our failure to come together as a nation based on our common values has led us to a boiling point that will come to head in just 365 days

**The question all of us must answer is this:** Are we going to elect a new president from a pool of socialist, self-aggrandizing Democrats who 1.) advocate abolishing private health care insurance in favor of Medicare for All? 2.) Support public funding of abortion? **Or are we going to re-elect a President who has helped to bring about the lowest level of unemployment in 50 years?**

By Gods glory I hope we don’t end up tossing out President Trump in favor of a leftist deceit. But if that happens, we will need loud CONSERVATIVE voices in the House to fight back.

_I want to lend my voice to the cause_ , %%First%%. If you haven’t already, please take a moment to visit my website at **[www.lerahlee.com](../October Nightmare/www.lerahlee.com)** to learn more about who I am and why I’m running for the Republican nomination for Georgia’s 7th Congressional District.

Currently, Georgia’s 7th district is currently just one of FIVE Republican held seats political forecasters say are tossups.

**What does that mean and why is it important you take notice?** It means Washington Democrats are going to spend millions to turn this seat blue. They’ve nearly succeeded before and won’t be sparing any expense next year.

In the 2018 midterms 433 votes is all that stood between the Republican victor and the Democrat challenger.

**Georgia is the new Texas, %%First%%.**

The House majority could very well be decided based on the outcome of this race.

**Election 2020 will be a defining point in our nation’s history, and I hope to play a small role in promoting a bold vision ensuring the survival of conservatism in the United States**.

My team and I have a long road ahead of yes over the next 365 days – knowing that I have your support means the world to me and I look forward to continuing this journey together.

Blessings always,
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=5080934277a44f39964019831478c79e&_e=Y6GN1dDPCAmpe393eW5D1YY-l1_BpcPr2RwupWLdPa1APJEbO-kSAYMWhhHpGSRM80Zc7pUGumYnl5FtCKMxS172DMA2OFFL2bE3XAPIvhqyNdwMKV9aFS9zofJbmEZDkPRdF8BpZUo6CuR7bEZGq2jwTgu08_TRkkosl4IBYUMoKsoAX9Vf7duYQ0r5SIQs67LDfY7HGZ2jHvuJeay97fzuwGOgu7QuUAi0Aek0BmoOWYFdjSiWpw6x5YC-Q9uWDgTTy7Xe_IXHZSXZs2UqkEG5xRUyKoMXNh75gBTs8-qGCujpfPcS5qoS0qtf_1zC)
Dr. Lerah Lee

| [**Donate Today »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=5080934277a44f39964019831478c79e&_e=Y6GN1dDPCAmpe393eW5D1YY-l1_BpcPr2RwupWLdPa1APJEbO-kSAYMWhhHpGSRM80Zc7pUGumYnl5FtCKMxS172DMA2OFFL2bE3XAPIvhop6kPxjfUqe1_X9PClM1KeHjmIEvHLEtY3LgeVD7BNM2cmPxuO3ETfFHVtfkFuUk3FCMcuPM1CYQ_JcGctri2QDVCvxCXvmvzblFjSJwQPjSkXO_HD-b-hAMMlr-1-rqRHdsUAH18d9ILnUZn1Lvfl_yl4F1Hot6A_WNT-HB889Mb_DZrxXVDBE3fMlXVmKinfR903u5hanmk_GPgSgoFr)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: 📉 Driving Down Healthcare Costs
body:
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489

https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=1s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489
In my family business and as board chair of a rural hospital, I've seen the countless ways Obamacare has driven up costs for Iowa neighbors. Hear (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=1s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) about my proposals.

https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489
https://richardsforcongress.com/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=8523ecaae1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_24_01_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-8523ecaae1-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489
Hi

This week, my focus was on improving our healthcare system. I toured the Crawford County Hospital in Denison and spoke with the staff about how the day-to-day operations of a rural hospital are affected by bureaucrats in Washington. What I learned reinforced what the people of the Fourth District already know:

➡️ (https://emojipedia.org/black-rightwards-arrow/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) Socialized medicine will never be the answer
➡️ (https://emojipedia.org/black-rightwards-arrow/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) Real solutions are needed like eliminating PBMs, pooling risk locally, and allowing Americans to purchase re-imported drugs
➡️ (https://emojipedia.org/black-rightwards-arrow/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) The free market should be expanded to allow for more insurance company competition across state lines
➡️ (https://emojipedia.org/black-rightwards-arrow/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) We must reduce the administrative burden on physicians brought on by Obamacare

In Congress, I will stand up to the Democrats and lobbyists who write regulations that allow insurance companies to continue to be an overbearing part of doctors' decision-making process. Doctors and nurses do not need to be spending hours on the phone defending their medical decisions to insurance companies when they know what is best for their patients. The bottom line is we MUST drive healthcare prices down.

I can't fight to reform our fractured healthcare system alone. Please consider chipping in $5 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution-page?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) , $15 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution-page?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) or even $25 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution-page?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) to our campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donation can be made here. (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489)

Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come!

Your neighbor,
P.S. Make sure you see the barn sign design at the bottom of the newsletter. They're here!
More On Healthcare
National News

Democrats have officially begun the process to impeach President Trump. Read my statement on Nancy Pelosi's huge waste of time and money below ⤵️⤵️⤵️ (https://emojipedia.org/arrow-pointing-rightwards-then-curving-downwards/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489)

Building Our Network
Great to reconnect at Iowa Faith & Freedom (https://www.facebook.com/Iowa-Faith-Freedom-Coalition-172788926072675/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) 's Fall Banquet with so many friends made over the past several months and learn about new ways to stand up for our Christian values.

Also really appreciated meeting with young conservatives at Morningside College's Campaign Fair on Monday to hear about how they defend their conservative beliefs on campus.

Recent Coverage

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-on-rfs-and-epa-with-fort-dodge-dodger-daily/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-on-rfs-and-epa-with-fort-dodge-dodger-daily/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489
Dodger Daily: "You’re a self-described regular, average Iowan trying to get involved...Bret Richards is going to live up to what he said. He’s going to try to stand up for the Fourth District people and put them first regardless."
Up Next

We have a very busy week coming up. We'll be attending Carroll (https://www.facebook.com/Carroll-County-Iowa-Republicans-140536195979207/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) , Cerro Gordo (https://www.facebook.com/CerroGordoGOP/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) , Audubon (https://www.facebook.com/AudubonGOP?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) , Calhoun (https://www.facebook.com/Calhoun-County-IA-GOP-706906856087900/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) , and Winnebago (https://www.facebook.com/WinnebagoCountyIowaGOP/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) counties' central committee meetings to continue to hear from the grassroots about ways to lower healthcare costs.

Get Involved
BARN SIGNS NOW AVAILABLE. EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM TO GET YOURS TODAY!
We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) we still need your help.

Want to serve as a county co-chair? Know others who might want to join our team? Send an email to volunteers@RichardsForCongress.com (mailto:volunteers@RichardsForCongress.com) to lend a hand.
Be sure to like us on Facebook (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=100f252f03&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) and follow us on Twitter (http://twitter.com/richards4iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) and Instagram (http://instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=45611e23f9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_31_08_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-45611e23f9-25822489) to stay up to date!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Will you take just a minute to watch this video?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bobby for Iowa
body:
I'm running because we have to win... for America's future. | | | |
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=438353fca6&e=90fad69796)
---
|
### Peter,

[**I made a video for Iowa's Youth Straw Poll!**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=646a4b68b6&e=90fad69796)

I'm running for Congress because I want to pass our great American Dream to the next generation. The liberal Democrats are pushing socialism, open borders, and impeaching the President. Those ideas do nothing for our young people.

Our common-sense conservative values are the best shot we have at creating a prosperous and free future for our kids.

[**Please share our video to help us get our conservative message out there. Like our page as well so that you get updates from our campaign to represent Iowa values in Congress.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=d750597d83&e=90fad69796)

Socialist presidential candidates are doing event after event right here in this district and bringing their far-left Hollywood and Manhattan money with them.

Helping us have a robust social media presence will help us fight against the biased left-wing tech companies that suppress conservative voices.

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. [**And we can't do that unless as many people as possible see our message. body:
What are you doing on November 8th? | |
---
| | [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=294f55f270&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| |
#
Peter, In the midst of this Impeachment Hoax, there’s nobody I’d rather spend time with than my most loyal supporters. I don’t want to spend another second with the SWAMP, I want to be amongst the PEOPLE. That’s why I have an exciting announcement for ONLY my TOP supporters, and I can’t wait to share it with you. I’ve scheduled an important event in Atlanta on November 8th where I’ll be meeting with great American Patriots, and [**I want YOU to be there with me as my VIP guest. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=169a93ab2c&e=02cd889ad3) My good friend, who’s a true warrior, Senator David Perdue, will also be there to meet and talk with the great people of Georgia. All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT by November 4th, and you’ll automatically be entered to win a meal with me. This offer is exclusive to my most LOYAL defenders, like YOU, so DON’T share this with anyone else. [**Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to be automatically entered to win a trip to meet me in Atlanta on November 8th.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e47444c516&e=02cd889ad3)
---

---
| This will be the trip of a lifetime, Peter. If you win, the team will cover your flight, hotel, and meal, AND you’ll get to bring a guest of your choice. We’ll even take a photo together so we can remember this day forever. [**Contribute ANY AMOUNT by the deadline on November 4th to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to meet your favorite President! **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c78b83255a&e=02cd889ad3) Thank you,
[](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=46a3566dbf&e=02cd889ad3)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

body:
I’ll make this quick - Beto just dropped out of the Presidential race and the deadline to file for the Texas Senate race is one month away. I forwarde

Friend,
I’ll make this quick - Beto just dropped out of the Presidential race and the deadline to file for the Texas Senate race is one month away. I forwarded our internal campaign memo below for you to see yourself!

Friend, our campaign is gearing up for Beto’s entrance into this race and we need your help immediately! We must prevent Beto from flipping Texas blue.
[**Can you give $10, $15 or $25 to our STOP BETO FUND?**](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=f93dc41bd0854902989117ab4c7e2e02&_e=Qun_nsm6s8gamQH3EV6Mx84U7oNwGneAjhf1h44Fo-MVW-fouZ8k2JVV10dObcx5MvbLbwlsVI3G2H0ytQAEox6Ereb_D9iyeQaDoMdMHnphz3PfGY0-Yno0el-2M6-ga0_MVobgKgK69JSBupGNpEVetmnZPKcmP-p5EVFl40quB58psCFDCpsvG52_RxiP3E2vICdOEY9sfwcNhX4EJzChwXSWaOJz0arAhlXbL66owYUrBul3qBn2YcOTKn2dBfqxWnTzphEUHu_UrSWsZwtA6HvUuXuoXjB5ATHZqvbU9wso9Ha9yXgpJVu-jPkra7s2AtQY4DqpbBklgG-ujBti8jTXWNacog1LYz7tgfGn4UNAzvwvt3rEhxFJVJnLsmt3SnNacFUUgMqquvN8f8sRVmlL0LPcPZx8PK1ovuoUbO5BqLC3YxQ3bLdaCoON)
****[STOP BETO FUND: GIVE NOW](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=f93dc41bd0854902989117ab4c7e2e02&_e=Qun_nsm6s8gamQH3EV6Mx84U7oNwGneAjhf1h44Fo-MVW-fouZ8k2JVV10dObcx5MvbLbwlsVI3G2H0ytQAEox6Ereb_D9iyeQaDoMdMHnphz3PfGY0-Yno0el-2M6-ga0_MVobgKgK69JSBupGNpEVetmnZPKcmP-p5EVFl40quB58psCFDCpsvG52_RxiP3E2vICdOEY9sfwcNhX4EJ4pxfCtVDGEcPuORIdNSPn0IyaGoVcPIvPD5FA_Hcl_qKphEvIedmA4GGEhpXi2iMkDCl2iuGPLM2YqTp0CSbQiqLXlfFyCm-OeSsEdaU8vCiYtCi1XVs1pX4khsHPjInvxRM72FFXuK3wylx9BqsS25p8SZm7mFumwxscKpwGDd9h6jXYcZ9ursIHDeSjCTxZ_TrPSmSwelEnwDPqlI4CXLdX4vroI7oU5zxMRrw6TY)** **
---
We have exactly one month to reach our goal of $500,000 to prevent Beto from filing the paperwork to challenge Senator Cornyn. Right now, Beto is the biggest threat to Texas!
He already said he would take away our guns and he supports open borders. What other crazy ideas will he force upon Texas? Our state is far from being a Beto-Blue state, so let’s make sure we stop him in his tracks.

**[Friend, can I count on you to donate to our STOP BETO FUND to keep Texas red?](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=f93dc41bd0854902989117ab4c7e2e02&_e=B80FgeLJ0ZEw5ZLmI4o_bvwW9yLNKva-Y6zWaRJVOqXx-_56ZOripGJ6a2dJgIP9aLf_O6DGtdGBbSVojMOKTIO2Uv9b5o2ffN2hNXWOAEC1yVM3Dvu8lcGccfXe4II6M3nou6oAlN9vgrrLtkYxo1y-HZQkrTlJeA07Qk0sfhBraJoC8ntXtMLeIJoztHCw5sFu3SgR51cxi--QGSXaIFpQQZpDV5SktYqHQPIINVVnSRF4cgIWXlTIeFclCrzawe3csE7VwlpyN4eZby7Im3k2x-unZ24BHL5_675ZKjDgVcDoiShWlHT16TYU2Ij94ErimHAjUQrWuZ_OuTOiDEC-D9H_4cQ_WPX5lEiBWJVVz_OytIVjUVVub9v86asQVKqYnaBGXJUm1zEXdw5iEeCBIUMhSYbQAxLkMKzxsjMrRvmItS-Os0CLpQBD8fNy)**

****[STOP BETO FUND: GIVE NOW](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=f93dc41bd0854902989117ab4c7e2e02&_e=Qun_nsm6s8gamQH3EV6Mx84U7oNwGneAjhf1h44Fo-MVW-fouZ8k2JVV10dObcx5MvbLbwlsVI3G2H0ytQAEox6Ereb_D9iyeQaDoMdMHnphz3PfGY0-Yno0el-2M6-ga0_MVobgKgK69JSBupGNpEVetmnZPKcmP-p5EVFl40quB58psCFDCpsvG52_RxiP3E2vICdOEY9sfwcNhX4EJ46lcy0PC_Ti_x19EFoRYs6wTB95LpNXSa0eim0cMFQgG6gK0yFfvYC33DA43I4tDfeAxOH_m8C1fgltpMGliqxzi1RyZQCgX04fK_t37XEKo4MO1A3qq1Ui6Htl5PeGwQtJk7-NofED8uXtXXCYoNWZY2igT5746J3yMUdPo67gH0MztUBXjampDDD_H9C_1gjLUl0Mf7qPR3safQgqaneK_XpC9apWBJtcC2sngLqD)** **
---
Thank you,
Spencer
Team Cornyn

**\----------** Forwarded Message Below**\---------**

Friend -

There’s a lot of information coming in very quickly, but here is what we know right now:
1\. Beto has dropped out of the presidential race.
2\. We’re still one month away from the filing deadline for Texas Senate.

Here’s one more thing we know, this was not about being “clear-eyed.”

In all likelihood, Beto is prepping for a run against Senator Cornyn.

As one of our most loyal supporters, I need to bring you into the fold on this. Our campaign team has pulled together a quick Strategy Memo, but you need to know, this is for your eyes only. It is my sincere hope that you will quickly read this memo, and [**consider giving $25 to help fund our effort:**](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=f93dc41bd0854902989117ab4c7e2e02&_e=Qun_nsm6s8gamQH3EV6Mx84U7oNwGneAjhf1h44Fo-MVW-fouZ8k2JVV10dObcx5MvbLbwlsVI3G2H0ytQAEox6Ereb_D9iyeQaDoMdMHnphz3PfGY0-Yno0el-2M6-ga0_MVobgKgK69JSBupGNpEVetmnZPKcmP-p5EVFl40quB58psCFDCpsvG52_RxiP3E2vICdOEY9sfwcNhX4EJxvVfoUjS-pYEfFV2dGMv0cmE2FcIo4rxxnFFMyBn1Bu6yahbCCoUg3Z7YSkXByOqL346Gl3OLQU21CFxWZSo1aaeuh81QtQQDjMf3OY955oJ4N9nGhDdz_HUz1pQKq1RnCTBmuqZAqcSrdN3TOqxP3Zm9RglSnIKIiJjMi311D1VvFV6FH_VLb6Iv0mWz4g726F-0A3rX7D-c6XZcNw_21nAovjvnVXp4yMf9SVAOq7)

Memo:
To: Senator Cornyn
From: Rob J,
Subject: Robert Francis / Beto Senate Run

In 2018, Robert Francis Beto lost to Ted Cruz by only 2.56% of the vote, and came within 215,000 votes of winning.

With the tremendous resources he can marshal, his ability to invest in long term persuasion campaigns in the areas around Austin, the Houston suburbs and Dallas pose a credible threat to our campaign.

**Strategy Memo**
---
**City** | **Votes at risk**
Austin | 75,000
Houston Suburbs | 45,000
Dallas | 100,000

Based on our analysis, and Beto’s spending potential, we calculate the need for a $500,000 infusion into the campaign.

Without these funds, we put our campaign at a strategic disadvantage, and give Robert Francis a head start.
###
This is some of the most sensitive information in our campaign, and I need you to understand that Democrats and Beto’s team, in particular, want to get their hands on this.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: #MoscowMitch has control of the Supreme Court. Can we win it back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The Supreme Court used to recognize the progressive values of our Constitution and country \-- they upheld women's rights, affirmed gay marriage, and ordered desegregation nationwide. But after #MoscowMitch blocked President Obama's final Supreme Court nominee from being confirmed and cemented a GOP majority on the bench for a generation with Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, the Court has upheld restrictions to abortion and allowed Trump's Muslim ban. Now, the justices are poised to allow LGBTQ discrimination based on religious beliefs. Retaking the Senate is now more important than ever \-- if Mitch McConnell and the corrupt Republican Party retain control, they'll block a Democratic president's nominations and keep the courts firmly in their chokehold. We're asking Democrats how important the Supreme Court is to them so we know where the electorate stands and how to shape our 2020 Election Strategy: **Do you want to win back the Supreme Court?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc60/6e9863e8/160d0111/1db081e9/170076477/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ibVmgM6o") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc60/6e9863e8/160d0111/1db081e9/170076477/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ibVmgM6o") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc60/6e9863e8/160d0111/1db081ef/170076477/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191103c.ND-b&refcode2=XGBmuJMGY8qbhdQpzHu9")

clean_body: | | | Peter, The Supreme Court used to recognize the progressive values of our Constitution and country \-- they upheld women's rights, affirmed gay marriage, and ordered desegregation nationwide. But after #MoscowMitch blocked President Obama's final Supreme Court nominee from being confirmed and cemented a GOP majority on the bench for a generation with Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, the Court has upheld restrictions to abortion and allowed Trump's Muslim ban. Now, the justices are poised to allow LGBTQ discrimination based on religious beliefs. Retaking the Senate is now more important than ever \-- if Mitch McConnell and the corrupt Republican Party retain control, they'll block a Democratic president's nominations and keep the courts firmly in their chokehold. name: Team Hick
subject: Hear it straight from FiveThirtyEight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Cory Gardner is "especially vulnerable" | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146e/691c9bd/6ff8eb2e/11a78648/949131066/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, FiveThirtyEight just weighed in on our race, and they've named it **one of the most flippable seats of 2020 --calling Cory Gardner "especially vulnerable".**

We know why he's "especially vulnerable"--it's his record.

Gardner's votes on issues from health care to gun safety to climate change are consistently out of step with Colorado. He puts Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's Washington special-interest agenda ahead of what's best for our state.

But let's face facts. The other side is not going down without a fight. They're mobilizing their big-money machine to help save Gardner. Meanwhile, we've built our campaign the right way, refusing to take one dime from corporate PACs.

Today marks exactly one year from Election Day 2020. **If flipping this seat and taking back control of the Senate is important to you,_[will you sign up to make a monthly recurring donation to build our grassroots campaign for the long haul?](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?recurring=auto&refcode=em_fr_20191103_TH_20191103-fr-TH-538-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")_**

This is one of the most impactful things you can do for our campaign--and for flipping the Senate blue in 2020.

We are so grateful for your support.

Thanks,
Team Hick [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191103_TH_20191103-fr-TH-538-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146e/691c9bd/6ff8eb2e/11a78647/949131066/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146e/691c9bd/6ff8eb2e/11a78644/949131066/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146e/691c9bd/6ff8eb2e/11a78645/949131066/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146e/691c9bd/6ff8eb2e/11a78642/949131066/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146e/691c9bd/6ff8eb2e/11a78643/949131066/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146e/691c9bd/6ff8eb2e/11a78640/949131066/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146e/691c9bd/6ff8eb2e/11a78647/949131066/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").
