name: MJ Hegar
subject: a major milestone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We have one year left to build this campaign into a force that's strong enough to defeat Senator Cornyn.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890876/7f51f7bc/4b3441fa/4ef348c0/535607264/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Today is a major milestone, Peter.

**We now have exactly one year left** to build this campaign into a force that's strong enough to defeat Senator Cornyn. This grassroots team has helped us hit the ground running, but [ **we need your help to keep up the pace and win this election.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890876/7f51f7bc/4b3441fa/4ef348c7/535607264/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutdayofmatch?refcode=email_20191103.2nd__472__&=amount=10&recurring=true") | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890876/7f51f7bc/4b3441fa/4ef348c7/535607264/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutdayofmatch?refcode=email_20191103.2nd__472__&=amount=10&recurring=true")
---
I've already traveled over 8,000 miles across Texas talking with voters about the issues that matter to them. I'm looking forward to talking with more Texans all across the state -- **but I 'm counting on your support to keep building momentum. **[**Can you chip in now?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890876/7f51f7bc/4b3441fa/4ef348c7/535607264/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutdayofmatch?refcode=email_20191103.2nd__472__&=amount=10&recurring=true")

I'm running for Senate to expand access to affordable health care, protect our communities from climate change, and to keep communities safe from gun violence. And I'm relying on grassroots donors like you -- not special interests and corporate PACs -- to help fund this campaign because that means I'll be **_accountable_** to folks like you.
Beating Senator Cornyn and his big special interest dollars won't be easy -- but hitting this $25,000 goal is how we make sure we're on track to do it.
**I 'm counting on you to help us reach our goal by midnight, Peter. Will you make your first MATCHED donation right now to help us get there?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890876/7f51f7bc/4b3441fa/4ef348c6/535607264/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutdayofmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191103.2nd__472__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890876/7f51f7bc/4b3441fa/4ef348c5/535607264/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutdayofmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191103.2nd__472__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890876/7f51f7bc/4b3441fa/4ef348c4/535607264/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutdayofmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191103.2nd__472__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890876/7f51f7bc/4b3441fa/4ef3493b/535607264/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutdayofmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191103.2nd__472__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890876/7f51f7bc/4b3441fa/4ef3493a/535607264/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutdayofmatch?refcode=email_20191103.2nd__472__")**
Thanks,
MJ Hegar
*If you've already contributed to the campaign or donated through a different source, thank you so much! Our records are based on our online database which may take some time to update.

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890876/7f51f7bc/4b3441fa/4ef34939/535607264/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutdayofmatch?refcode=email_20191103.2nd__472__&amount=10&recurring=true")
